productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Blue Bags
description: Leave behind your cares of wondering how to carry your vacation shopping back home with this foldable travel bag from united colors of benetton. Roll it up into a small ball when not in use and open it for a copious space.Length: 55 cmWidth: 22 cmHeight: 28 cmMade of 100% polyester for durability and easy maintenanceHas one main roomy zippered compartment, with the roll up pouch forming an inner zippered pouch when opened upHas one zippered compartment on the outsideWide synthetic twill tape handles for carrying easeBrand name printed on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
